title: Realty Income Announces $1.5 Billion Sale-Leaseback of Convenience Store Properties from EG Group
text: SAN DIEGO , March 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced that it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire up to 415 single-tenant convenience store properties located in the U.S. from EG Group, a leading independent convenience retailer based in the United Kingdom.
